recommendations.title: A Matador's Mistress
recommendations.overview: Scandal erupts over a famous bullfighter's affair with a left-wing actress.

recommendations.title: Voyeur
recommendations.overview: Legendary journalist Gay Talese unmasks a motel owner who spied on his guests for decades. But his bombshell story soon becomes a scandal of its own.

recommendations.title: California Suite
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of four groups of guests at the Beverly Hills Hotel.

recommendations.title: Hotel Desire
recommendations.overview: Antonia is a single mother who works as a hotel maid in Berlin. A normal hot summer day takes a dramatic turn when she crosses paths with a particular guest of the hotel, famous blind portrait painter Julius Pass.

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
recommendations.overview: Mumbai, India, November 26, 2008. While several terrorists spread hatred and death through the city, others attack the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Both hotel staff and guests risk their lives, making unthinkable sacrifices to protect themselves and keep

recommendations.title: Royalteen
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to keep her scandal-ridden past and a big secret from getting out when she strikes up an unlikely romance with the crown prince.

recommendations.title: Jingle Bell Heist
recommendations.overview: Two down-on-their-luck hourly workers team up to rob a posh London department store on Christmas Eve. Will they steal each other's hearts along the way?

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: A madly-in-love young couple's relationship begins to suffer when they struggle to conceive a child.

recommendations.title: Do Revenge
recommendations.overview: A dethroned queen bee at a posh private high school strikes a secret deal with an unassuming new student to enact revenge on one another’s enemies.

recommendations.title: Royalteen: Princess Margrethe
recommendations.overview: In the wake of her prom scandal, Princess Margrethe longs for normalcy as she struggles to maintain her perfect facade while dealing with family drama.
